title: Bike Touring - Greece - Istmus of Corinth Bridge 6-2010

transcript.text: Here's the Isthmus of Karim. I don't know how we're going to get across.
Give me one's guess. I'm just waiting here with some other people.
I think I should have gone up to the really intense part where they cut it. That would have been cool.
What the hell's going on here? Here's the Isthmus.
